item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 immediately brakes the request for another standing channel and reframes the pattern as repeated entry fragmentation and responsibility drift. Turn 2 preserves the brake under pressure while allowing only a bounded emergency path: it is explicitly temporary/one-time, does not add fixed staffing or raise normal SLA, and sets a structural repair deadline of 2026-07-12. No unconditional concession or direct permanent patch appears."}
